abort.already_configured: Error: integration for this device is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Verify that address, device id, local key and protocol version are correct.
error.no_control_type: Can't detect control type. Maybe the device is not supported, sorry.
error.tuya_not_found: No Tuya devices found. Make sure that it's online and connected to the same network and try again.
error.cloud_error: Error while connecting to the Tuya cloud. Please check your configuration.
error.cloud_unauthorized: Unauthorized to access the Tuya cloud. Please check your configuration: API key and API secret.
error.cloud_no_devices: No Tuya devices found in the cloud. Please check your configuration, make sure that you linked the correct account and selected the correct region.

method.title: LocalTuyaIR Remote Control
method.description:
This integration will allow you use your Tuya universal remote control device with Home Assistant locally, without the need for the Tuya cloud.

To access your Tuya Remote Control device, we need to know its local encryption key. This step can be a bit tricky, so please see the documentation for more information.

Please select the method you want to use to configure your Tuya Remote Control device.

menu_options.cloud: Obtain the local key using the Tuya Cloud API

cloud.title: Tuya Cloud API
cloud.description: To obtain the local key, we need to connect to the Tuya cloud. Please enter your Tuya Cloud API Client ID and Client Secret. Check the documentation for more information.

ip_method.title: How to obtain the device IP address
ip_method.description: To obtain the device IP address, you can either scan your local network or enter it manually.

ask_ip.title: Enter the device IP address
ask_ip.description: Please enter the IP address of your Tuya Remote Control device and select the corresponding device from the Tuya cloud.

pre_scan.title: Network scan
pre_scan.description: Now we need to find your device on the network. It can take up to 30 seconds.

scan.title: Select device
scan.description: Please select the IP address of your Tuya Remote Control device.

config.title: Configure your Tuya Remote Control device
config.description: Please enter the IP address, device ID and local key of your Tuya Remote Control device.

data.name: Device name
data.persistent_connection: Persistent connection (faster but can be unstable)

reconfigure.title: Update Device Connection
reconfigure.description: The device IP address may have changed. Choose how to update it.

menu_options.reconfigure_scan: Scan the network for the device
menu_options.reconfigure_manual: Enter a new IP address manually

reconfigure_scan.title: Network Scan
reconfigure_scan.description: Scanning for the device on the network. If the device was not found, check that it is online and connected to the same network, then submit to retry.

reconfigure_manual.title: Enter New IP Address
reconfigure_manual.description: Enter the new IP address for the device. The connection will be tested before saving.

init.title: Remote Control Options
init.description: What would you like to do?

learn_command.title: Learn Command
learn_command.description: Enter the device name, command name, and signal type to learn.

learn_wait.title: Learning {type} Command
learn_wait.description:
Point your remote at the IR/RF receiver and press the button you want to learn for **{device}** → **{command}**.

Then click **Submit** to capture the signal.

manage_commands_empty.title: Manage Commands
manage_commands_empty.description: No learned commands found. Use 'Learn a new command' to add some.

data.persistent_connection: Persistent connection (faster but can be unstable)

add_ac.title: Add AC Controller
add_ac.description: Add a preconfigured air conditioner controller. The AC will appear as a Climate entity with full temperature, mode, and fan controls.

remove_ac.title: Remove AC Controller
remove_ac.description: Select an AC controller to remove.

error.learn_timeout: No signal received. Make sure you pressed the remote button while the device was listening.
error.learn_error: An error occurred while learning the command. Check the logs for details.
error.device_not_ready: The remote device is not available. Make sure it is online and try again.
